basic_details.job_title: THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Officer, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
basic_details.short_information: The Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) has officially announced the Project Positions Recruitment 2026 with 6 openings. The detailed notification was published on 12 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per Government of India norms (SC/ST 5 yr, OBC 3 yr, PwBD 10–15 yr, etc.) and hold a Post Graduate degree in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health (Ph.D. desirable), with clinical trial monitoring experience, GCP certification, and Finance & Accounts experience (depending on post) can now submit their online applications from 12 May

age_limit.age_details: As per GoI norms (SC/ST 5 yr, OBC 3 yr, PwBD 10–15 yr, etc.)
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GoI norms (SC/ST 5 yr, OBC 3 yr, PwBD 10–15 yr, etc.).

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health, PhD (desirable), Clinical trial monitoring experience, GCP certification, Finance & Accounts experience
qualification.details: Research Officer: PG in Life Sciences + 3 years of clinical trial monitoring experience OR PhD + monitoring experience. Project Manager (Monitoring): PG + 5 years of monitoring experience OR PhD + 2 years of monitoring experience (desirable: project/line management experience). Clinical Research Associate: Master’s in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health + 3 years of monitoring experience OR MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS/BPT + monitoring experience. Senior Project Associate: PG in Life Sciences + mandatory GCP certification. Consultant (Finance): B.Com + 4 years OR M.Com + 2 years of experience in Finance & Accounts.

salary_details.details: Research Officer: ₹67,000 + HRA Per Month Project Manager (Monitoring): ₹78,000 + HRA Per Month Clinical Research Associate: ₹67,000 + HRA Per Month Senior Project Associate: ₹56,000 + HRA Per Month Consultant (Finance): ₹60,000 (fixed) Per Month

selection_process: Application Screening/Shortlisting Written Test/Skill Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of THSTI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the THSTI Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for most of the Project Positions at THSTI is 01 June 2026. However, the Research Officer position has a walk-in interview on 25 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by THSTI?
faq.answer: THSTI has announced a total of 6 vacancies for various Project Positions, including Research Officer, Project Manager, Clinical Research Associate, Senior Project Associate, and Consultant (Finance).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, candidates need a Post Graduate degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, or Public Health. Some positions also require specific experience in clinical trial monitoring, GCP certification, or finance and accounts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the THSTI Project Positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹56,000 to ₹78,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), depending on the specific post. The Consultant (Finance) position has a fixed salary of ₹60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the THSTI Project Positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official THSTI website. The application process involves filling out the online form, uploading necessary documents, and paying the application fee, if applicable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay ₹590, while SC/ST and Women candidates need to pay ₹118.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for applying to THSTI posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is as per Government of India norms, with relaxations provided for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), and PwBD (10-15 years) categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for THSTI Project Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves application screening/shortlisting, followed by a written test or skill test, and an interview. Document verification is the final stage.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of THSTI?
faq.answer: THSTI is located in Faridabad, Haryana.
